title: Ubiquiti UA-Hub-Gate, UniFi Access Gate Hub
description: UA-Hub-Gate , part of the UniFi Access product line, enables convenient control of entry gates and doors. Operation can be easily automated using connected readers, intercoms, and AI cameras , facilitated by four RJ45 PoE output ports with a total power budget of 28W . The controller is designed for indoor use but can be installed outdoors in a weatherproof enclosure (2) Gate operator terminals (dry) Lock terminal for side door (12V) AUX terminal for an external siren (5) Additional inputs for sensors and emergency (5) 10/100/1000Mbps LAN ports (1x PoE-in, 4x with PoE Passthrough support) With a connected UniFi Protect camera featuring AI capabilities, the gate can be opened automatically based on license plate recognition. The controller can connect up to 4 readers, intercoms, or cameras, with a maximum power consumption of 28W Device DIN rail (2) Screws and wall plugs
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (5) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 50V DC Power type PoE PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In PoE-Out standards Passive 48V PoE Out ports 4 Max. power consumption [W] 22
